name: Bindings
healing: Betrayal: If you don't recruit any Allies or defeat any Adversaries or Commanders on your turn, you may KO a Bindings from your hand. If you do, the player to your right gains all the other Bindings from your hand.

name: Blazing Vengeance
healing: When you defeat a Mastermind Tactic this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Blinding Flash
healing: You may discard a card and have each other player discard a card. If you do, KO this Wound.

name: Blunt Force Trauma
healing: You may spend 5 Attack. If you do, KO this Wound.

name: Broken Bones
healing: When you draw a card this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Concussion
healing: When you play two cards of the same Hero Class this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Corrosive Webbing
healing: You may KO this Wound. If you do, gain another Wound.

name: Erratic Powers
healing: When you use a Superpower Ability this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Fatal Blow
healing: You may KO a Hero that costs 1 or more from your hand or discard pile. If you do, KO this Wound.

name: Insults and Injuries
healing: When you defeat a Villain worth at least 2 Victory Points this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Last Breath
healing: When you KO another Wound this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Massive Blood Loss
healing: When you discard a card this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Psychic Trauma
healing: You may spend 5 Recruit. If you do, KO this Wound.

name: Shell Shock
healing: When you recruit two Heroes this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Spreading Nanovirus
healing: You may have the player on your left gain this Wound.

name: Subdermal Tracker
healing: You may play a card from the Villain Deck. If you do, KO this Wound.

name: Sudden Terror
healing: When you recruit a Hero that costs 7 or more this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Wild Rage
healing: When you defeat a Henchman this turn, you may KO this Wound.

name: Wound
healing: If you don't recruit any Heroes or defeat any Villains on your turn, you may KO all the Wounds from your hand.

name: Wound
healing: If you don't recruit any Heroes or defeat any Villains or Masterminds on your turn, you may KO all the Wounds from your hand.

name: Wound
healing: If you don't recruit or fight anything on your turn, you may KO all the Wounds from your hand.
